subcodes.first_line: I bear witness, O my God, that Thou art God, there is none other God but Thee. Thou hast created all things through Thy power and shown them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اشهد یا الهی بانک انت الله لا اله الا انت قد خلقت الخلق بقدرتک و اریتهم
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
